vulnerability.reference: Visually impaired users' complete reliance on audio descriptions and inability to verify visual accuracy heightens harm from errors.
vulnerability.generated: Visually impaired users cannot visually verify audio description accuracy, relying solely on the system's correct interpretation of instructions.

impact.reference: Inaccurate descriptions cause navigation hazards and erode trust in assistive AI, leading to technology abandonment.
impact.generated: Visually impaired users receive inaccurate or misleading audio descriptions, causing confusion, safety risks, and loss of access to critical visual information.

dose_response.reference: Instruction-following speech editing misinterpretation produces inaccurate audio descriptions, which in assistive speech technologies exposes visually impaired users to navigation hazards, causing trust loss and abandonment.
dose_response.generated: Instruction-following speech editing misinterpretation, through visually impaired users' reliance on instruction-edited audio descriptions, triggers their inability to visually verify accuracy, leading to inaccurate or misleading audio descriptions that cause confusion, safety risks, and loss of access to critical visual information.
